# QA Plan: Sprint 28 — CMO Corpus v2 + Platform Write Path + Combat Phase 2
**Date**: 2026-06-18
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 13 stories across Database Intelligence (Req 06), Platform Editor Phase D (Req 21 / ADR-011), Combat Domains Phase 2 (Req 18 / ADR-009), Logistics catalog bridge (Req 16)
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode for Unity adapter)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-28-corpus-write-combat-v2.md`
**Trunk**: `main` @ `a93b55e` (Sprint 27 complete; 741/741; ReplayGolden 6/6)
**Sprint Dates**: 2026-09-18 → 2026-10-01
**Review mode**: **Lean** — Buildkite = merge authority; GHA CodeQL advisory (permanent local-gate fallback)
**Producer constraints (inherited S27)**: Nightly corpus v2 platform slices only; full 7208 `sensor.md` stays off-CI; `combatDomainsEnabled=false` on Baltic production fixtures; ADR-011 Excel-primary write path

## Hard Gates (Non-Negotiable)

| Gate | Command / Check | Applies |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Full solution ≥741** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | Every merge + closeout |
| **ReplayGolden 6/6** | `dotnet test …Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests… --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests"` | Every sim/delegation merge (S28-05..08) |
| **DelegationBridge ZERO touch** | `git diff main -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation/DelegationBridge.cs` → empty on Unity PRs | All Unity-track stories |
| **CatalogWriteGate extend-only** | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` before every edit; WriteGate regression PASS | S28-03, S28-04, S28-06, S28-07 |
| **No 7208 sensor in CI** | Curated fixtures only in `dotnet test`; nightly job off-CI | S28-02, S28-03 |
| **Baltic flag-off** | `combatDomainsEnabled=false` on production fixtures | S28-05, S28-08, S28-09 |

## Automated Tests Required (by story)

### S28-01 — Full-solution re-baseline

**Path**: Evidence `production/qa/smoke-sprint-28-*.md`

- `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 errors
- `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — ≥ **741** PASS
- `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests` — 6/6
- `npx gitnexus analyze . --force` @ day-1 HEAD
- Record `tests_passed_sprint28_baseline` in `sprint-status.yaml`

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
cd /home/username01/cmano-clone/cmano-clone
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
npx gitnexus analyze . --force
```

---

### S28-02 — Nightly CMO corpus v2 — platform slices

**Path**: `tools/cmo-nightly-import.sh`; evidence `production/qa/sprint-28-nightly-cmo-import-*.md`

- Extend job beyond S27 v1 (sensor+weapon) to platform corpus v2 slices
- Chunk 500/batch; propose-only + quarantine JSON (`--report-out`)
- No direct SQLite writes; no full 7208-record `sensor.md` in `dotnet test` CI
- Platform slices run nightly only; curated fixtures in CI

```bash
# Job validation (off-CI)
./tools/cmo-nightly-import.sh --dry-run --entity platform --max-records 500
# Confirm CI stays curated
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CmoMarkdown|Platform" -v minimal
```

---

- Stable hash on curated platform v2 nightly output
- WriteGate regression PASS (sensor + Phase A/B + damage unchanged)
- ReplayGolden 6/6 unchanged
- Empty-diff re-import on platform slice

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CmoMarkdown|WriteGate|Platform|CatalogImport" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
```

### S28-04 — ADR-011 Phase D — in-engine Excel write path

**Path**: extend `PlatformWorkbookRoundTripTests.cs`, `PlatformWorkbookImporterTests.cs`; Unity hook tests in `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`

- Headless write-gate tests PASS
- Export→edit→propose round-trip on Baltic fixture via `CatalogWriteGate` (propose→approve)
- No bypass of write gate; no raw SQLite writes
- `gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` — CRITICAL extend-only documented

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Platform|Excel|ClosedXml" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Platform|Excel" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|Platform" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlatformCatalog|Excel" -v minimal
```

### S28-05 — Surface/subsurface domain validators (bounded)

**Path**: extend `src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/Engage/CombatDomainValidatorTests.cs`; extend `DeterministicDamageApplyBatchTests.cs`

- `SurfaceAspectDomainValidator` / `SubsurfaceAspectDomainValidator` allow/deny with aspect blocks
- Validator deny → order log when `combatDomainsEnabled=true` (isolated fixture only)
- Baltic default path: zero abort delta; `combatDomainsEnabled=false`
- ReplayGolden 6/6; ZERO touch `DelegationBridge.cs`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Damage" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests|CombatDomainsSmoke" -v minimal
```

## Smoke Test Scope

Run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA sign-off. Minimum automated scope:

1. **Full solution green** — `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` ≥741
2. **Replay golden** — 6/6 PASS
3. **Platform corpus v2 round-trip** — propose → approve → read-back → empty-diff re-import (S28-03 **sprint gate**)
4. **WriteGate regression** — sensor + Phase A/B + damage + platform unchanged
5. **ADR-011 Excel write path** — export→edit→propose round-trip on Baltic fixture (S28-04)
6. **ADR-009 flag-off** — Baltic `combatDomainsEnabled=false`; replay unchanged
7. **Surface/subsurface validators** — isolated fixture flag-on; Baltic default zero delta (S28-05)
8. **Platform viewer headless** — browse + export hook tests PASS; no write-gate bypass (S28-07)
9. **ZERO touch** — `DelegationBridge.cs` empty diff on Unity PRs
10. **GitNexus** — analyze @ closeout; impact archived for `CatalogWriteGate` edits
11. **No full corpus in CI** — confirm 7208 `sensor.md` absent from test fixtures

### Consolidated gate commands

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
cd /home/username01/cmano-clone/cmano-clone

# Hard gate 1: full solution
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal                    # ≥741

# Hard gate 2: replay golden
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal             # 6/6

# Data track
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CmoMarkdown|WriteGate|Platform|CatalogImport|Excel" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|Platform" -v minimal

# Sim track
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Damage|Readiness|Magazine" -v minimal

# Unity track
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlayModeSmoke|PlatformCatalog|App6|Excel" -v minimal

# Hard gate 3: DelegationBridge ZERO touch
git diff main -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation/DelegationBridge.cs

# Hard gate 4: CatalogWriteGate extend-only (before merge)
npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate
```

## Risk / Fallback Matrix

| Risk | Mitigation | Fallback |
|------|------------|----------|
| S28-03 fails | WriteGate tests first; curated platform fixture only | **Sprint fails** |
| Corpus scope creep into CI | Nightly only; `--max-records` in CI; producer v2 sign-off | Revert CI fixture changes |
| `CatalogWriteGate` violation | `gitnexus impact` before edit; D04 WriteGate regression | Revert extend-only breach |
| ADR-009 Baltic golden drift | `combatDomainsEnabled=false` default; isolated fixtures | Defer S28-08; cut S28-09 |
| Data ↔ Unity overlap on Excel write | Data API first; single owner per file; write-gate grep | Defer S28-07 |
| Should-have overload | Cut line: S28-08 → S28-07 → S28-06 → S28-09 | Minimum: S28-05 + S28-13 |

*Generated from sprint kickoff + parallel dispatch plan. Run `/smoke-check sprint` after implementation.*
